title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Huawei announced the Tau Scaling Law to compete in the global semiconductor race. Advanced packaging techniques and logic folding are emerging as key focuses alongside traditional lithography methods as the competition between China and the USA intensifies in chip manufacturing.
